item.name: Starlight Steed Horn
item.description: When blown, this gleaming horn produces a heartwarming sound that calls your Starlight steed to your side.

mount.name: Starlight Steed
mount.action: Summon forth your Starlight steed, which, despite being an illusion, can bring very real joy to one and all.
mount.description: The reindeer Blitzen, visiting from Sharlayan, gifted you this ridable glamour as a show of gratitude for your kind aid. From the creature itself to the presents, all is recreated in such impressive detail that it could only be considered a Starlight miracle.
